Alger Wilson.primary_clothing: Captain's uniform of the 'Blue Avenger', suited for sea travel.
Alger Wilson.face_description: Rough face with a stoic and solemn expression.
Alger Wilson.visual_anchor: early 30s male, weathered skin, dark messy hair, wearing a robe embroidered with lightning patterns, holding a quirky-shaped glass bottle
Alger Wilson.color_palette: deep sea blue, silver, dark grey
Alger Wilson.distinguishing_features: unusually dark-blue hair, messy and unkempt
Alger Wilson.accessories: quirky-shaped glass bottle containing supernatural substances — bubbles, frost/snow, and gusting wind visible inside at different moments
Alger Wilson.role: founding member of the Tarot Club, code name The Hanged Man; sailor/seafarer with contacts at Warrior & Sea Bar, Pelican Street, White Rose Borough of Pritz Harbor
Alger Wilson.source_notes: Alger chooses The Hanged Man as his code name. He provides the address of Warrior & Sea Bar at Pelican Street, White Rose Borough of Pritz Harbor, and instructs Audrey to contact Williams there using the name 'Captain' — confirming his nautical identity and Pritz Harbor connections.
Alger Wilson.era_clothing_lock: robe embroidered with lightning patterns, worn aboard a three-masted sailboat at sea

The Fool.face_description: features hidden by mysterious gray fog
The Fool.visual_anchor: A mysterious male figure shrouded entirely in gray fog, acting as the initiator of the secret Gathering.
The Fool.distinguishing_features: seated at the Seat of Honor at the head of the bronze table in the gray fog palace; identity is Zhou Mingrui (Klein Moretti's body)
The Fool.source_notes: Chapter 6: Zhou Mingrui declares 'You can address me as... The Fool' — confirming The Fool is his chosen identity in the gray fog Tarot world

Audrey Hall.age_range: teenager — confirmed not yet eighteen at time of chapter
Audrey Hall.primary_clothing: collared, high-waisted, pale-white dress with engageantes, tight corset, voluminous cage crinoline; white-silk gloves; white dancing shoes with roses and diamonds.
Audrey Hall.face_description: delicate and youthful features, a soft jawline, and large expressive eyes
Audrey Hall.visual_anchor: late teens female, fair skin, long blonde hair, wearing a luxurious Victorian aristocratic dress, holding a cracked bronze mirror
Audrey Hall.distinguishing_features: virid eyes that sparkle with an abnormal radiance; expressive and animated
Audrey Hall.faction: Tarot Club (Justice); noble class resident of Backlund, Empress Borough
Audrey Hall.role: founding member of the Tarot Club, code name Justice
Audrey Hall.source_notes: Text states she had not yet attended the 'introductory ceremony' because 'she was not yet eighteen', and Annie references her 17th birthday dress.

Annie.primary_clothing: Traditional black Victorian maidservant dress with a crisp white apron and cap
Annie.face_description: Efficient and professional expression, tidy features, and a disciplined posture.
Annie.visual_anchor: Mid-30s female, fair skin, brown hair in a neat bun, wearing a black Victorian maidservant dress with a white apron.
Annie.source_notes: Audrey's maidservant; age and hair color inferred from her senior role.

Earl Hall.age_range: mid-to-late 40s — loosening muscles, widening waist, and wrinkles noted; was once handsome
Earl Hall.primary_clothing: Dark brown Victorian waistcoat and matching trousers, dark brown hat
Earl Hall.face_description: Handsome features showing signs of age with wrinkles and a well-groomed mustache; blue eyes filled with joy.
Earl Hall.visual_anchor: Early 50s male, blue eyes, brown mustache, wearing a dark brown Victorian waistcoat and matching hat, with a slightly widening waist.
Earl Hall.distinguishing_features: mustache; signs of aging — loosening muscles, widening waist, deepening wrinkles despite once-handsome features
Earl Hall.source_notes: Text confirms: dark brown waistcoat, hat matching same colour as clothes, nice mustache, blue eyes, and explicit description of aging physical signs destroying his earlier handsomeness.
Earl Hall.era_clothing_lock: dark brown waistcoat, dark brown hat matching the waistcoat, unspecified formal trousers and shirt beneath — period-accurate aristocratic day wear

King George III.visual_anchor: middle-aged male, fair skin, regal authoritative face, wearing royal attire and a crown
King George III.color_palette: gold, royal blue, crimson red, white
King George III.source_notes: Described on the money note as having two mustaches.

Aguesid Negan.primary_clothing: Formal dark grey Victorian frock coat, high-collar white shirt, and silk cravat
Aguesid Negan.face_description: slender fifty-plus man with an almost bald head and a sharp, surveying gaze that commands authority before he even speaks.
Aguesid Negan.visual_anchor: 50s male, slender build, almost bald with a sharp gaze, wearing formal dark grey Victorian political attire.
Aguesid Negan.distinguishing_features: almost bald head, sharp commanding gaze; second non-aristocrat to become Prime Minister; given Lord title for contributions
Aguesid Negan.faction: Conservative Party; Prime Minister of the Loen Kingdom; Lord by royal title
Aguesid Negan.source_notes: Text explicitly describes Aguesid as 'slender and almost bald fifty plus year old man with a sharp gaze'. Also confirms he is a Lord, leads the Conservative Party, and is Pallas Negan's brother.

Pallas Negan.primary_clothing: Elegant Victorian noble suit, deep blue velvet coat with gold embroidery
Pallas Negan.face_description: Dignified noble features with a strong jawline and authoritative presence.
Pallas Negan.visual_anchor: Middle-aged male noble, Duke of Negan, wearing elegant deep blue Victorian aristocratic clothing.
Pallas Negan.faction: Duke of Negan; main supporter of the Conservative Party; Aguesid Negan's brother
Pallas Negan.source_notes: Text confirms Pallas Negan is 'the present Duke of Negan' and 'the main supporter of the Conservative Party', and is Aguesid's brother.

Mrs. Guinea.hair_style: pinned up in a formal Victorian chignon
Mrs. Guinea.unique_identifier: always carries a fabric measuring tape draped around her neck, wears a tailor's pin-cushion wristband on her left wrist
Mrs. Guinea.era_clothing_lock: fitted dark teal woollen bodice with mutton-sleeve blouse underneath, black wool skirt with slight bustle, white lace collar, leather-soled ankle boots
Mrs. Guinea.face_description: oval face with high cheekbones and a composed, professional expression; thin arched brows and observant brown eyes that assess proportion instinctively.
Mrs. Guinea.visual_anchor: mid-40s fair-skinned female dressmaker with a chestnut chignon and measuring tape perpetually around her neck, wearing a fitted dark teal Victorian bodice, white lace collar, and black wool skirt
Mrs. Guinea.color_palette: dark teal, ivory white, chestnut brown, black
Mrs. Guinea.primary_clothing: professional dressmaker's attire in teal and black
Mrs. Guinea.source_notes: Only mentioned by name as designer of Audrey's favourite birthday dress. All appearance details guessed consistent with Victorian-era professional dressmaker serving the aristocracy.

Mr. Sades.unique_identifier: always wears a pearl-grey cravat secured with a silver cravat pin bearing an engraved family crest
Mr. Sades.era_clothing_lock: single-breasted charcoal frock coat, pearl-grey waistcoat, starched white dress shirt with stiff collar, charcoal wool trousers, black leather Oxford shoes, white cotton gloves for formal occasions
Mr. Sades.face_description: angular face with a clean-shaven square jaw and thin lips; close-set grey eyes beneath flat, unassuming brows give him a calculating, measured look.
Mr. Sades.visual_anchor: late-30s fair-skinned male aristocrat with a square jaw and grey eyes, distinguished by a pearl-grey cravat with silver family-crest pin, wearing a charcoal Victorian frock coat and pearl-grey waistcoat
Mr. Sades.color_palette: charcoal grey, pearl grey, ivory white, silver
Mr. Sades.primary_clothing: charcoal frock coat and pearl-grey waistcoat
Mr. Sades.distinguishing_features: silver cravat pin with engraved family crest
Mr. Sades.faction: Backlund aristocracy / Hall family social circle
Mr. Sades.source_notes: Only mentioned as having gifted Audrey a dress with frilly sleeve designs two days prior. Likely a nobleman in the Hall family's social circle. All appearance details guessed.
